Projects that been publicly reported but have not yet moved actively forward by applying for permits or seeking land, material, or financing. Examples: (1) projects are the potential “Phase 2” at a location where “Phase 1” is currently under development, (2) Projects that are described in long-range company or governmental planning documents.
Projects that are actively moving forward in seeking governmental approvals, land rights, or financing.
Prefecture, district, or municipality (China) where project is located
Notes
Nameplate capacity, or best available data, of the phase in megawatts rounded to its nearest tenth.
Longitude, assumed WGS84 (google maps), of the project phase
If there are multiple external datasets, entries are comma separated.
The Country/Area column presents energy data within various economic contexts, and the geographical unit does not strictly follow political boundaries.
Specific to distributed solar tab.
Roman numerals are changed to numbers. If the Owner uses non-sequential numbers or other characters, those are used.
Projects for which no information could be found specifying the technology type are listed as "Assumed PV" because PV is by far the most common technology.
Previous GEM ID numbers have been preserved from releases prior to 2024. For example, a previous GEM ID of L812345 is now L100000812345.
Previous GEM ID numbers have been preserved from releases prior to 2024. For example, a previous GEM ID of G812345 is now G100000812345.
Preference is for a government provided name. Without that information, the name the owner or operating company uses was taken, or the name was generated based on project location.
Please refer to "Thresholds for Data Categories" section above.
Notes
Locations feature 4 decimal places for Latitude and Longitude fields.
Left blank for local languages use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise operator name in local script included if possible.
Left blank for local languages that use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise local name in local script provided if possible.
Left blank for local languages that use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise direct owner name included in local script if possible.
Latest date was taken when original data source provided a range; Start years not included for projects that are cancelled or shelved.
Company that performs day-to-day operations and maintenance of the project.

Capacity may be reported as the DC / peak value the arrays could provide or as the AC value of what will be tied into the grid. This is often not specified and could be either value when reported as just 'MW'.
